Dr. Gordon Freeman doesn't speak, but he's got a helluva story to tell. This first-person roller-coaster initiated a new era in the history of action games by combining engrossing gameplay, upgraded graphics, ingenious level design and a revolutionary story that may not be all that it seems, told not through cutscenes, but through the visual environment.

Dr. Gordon Freeman arrives late for work at 8:47 am in the Black Mesa Research Facility, using the advanced Black Mesa tram system that leads through the facility. He arrives at the Anomalous Materials Lab, his work place, and he is informed by the security officer that the scientists have a special experiment today, so he goes to the locker room and puts on the hazard suit. He goes to the lab's lower levels, and arrives at the Anti-Mass Chamber, where he is instructed that the specimen to be used that day is the rarest and also the most unstable specimen. He is tasked with pushing the specimen into the scanning beam of the Anti-Mass Spectrometer for analysis. However as soon as he pushes it, it explodes, and creates a sudden catastrophe called a "resonance cascade", opening a portal between Earth and a dimension called Xen. Freeman is apparently teleported to an alien planet and catches glimpses of various alien lifeforms, including a circle of Vortigaunts, shortly before blacking out.
1998 first-person shooter video game

《 半条命 》（ Half Life ，简称 HL ，中国大陆译作 半條命 ，台湾、港澳译作 战栗时空 ）是 Valve 公司开发的 科幻 类型 第一人称射击游戏 ， 1998年 由 雪乐山 公司出版发行。游戏使用的引擎是由 雷神之锤II引擎 修改的 GoldSrc 引擎。游戏最初版本只可在 Windows 系统运行，后来被移植到 Sony 的 PlayStation 2 平台上。玩家扮演已毕业的 理论物理学家 戈登·弗里曼 ，由于一次的实验失败，玩家需要从一个秘密地下研究所中（ 黑山研究所 ）逃出生天。

game.title: Baldur's Gate 3
game.description:
An ancient evil has returned to Baldur's Gate, intent on devouring it from the inside out. The fate of Faerun lies in your hands. Alone, you may resist. But together, you can overcome.

The land of Faerûn is in turmoil. Refugees cross the wilds, fleeing the helltorn stronghold of Elturel. A vicious cult marches across the Sword Coast, uniting every race of monsters and men under the banner of a cryptic god they call the Absolute. Chaos strikes at Faerûn's foundations, and none may escape its talons. Not even you.

The grotesque nautiloid ship appears out of nowhere, blotting out the sun. Its writhing tentacles snatch you from where you stand. The mind flayers have come, imprisoning you on their ship, infecting you with their horrid parasite. You will become one of them.

By fate or fortune, you survive when the nautiloid crashes in the Sword Coast outlands. You set out for civilisation, desperate for a cure for the parasite festering in your brain, only to take centre stage in a conspiracy that runs as deep as the Nine Hells. New enemies await.

As for old foes... the shadows stir.
And all roads lead to the legendary city of Baldur's Gate.

Reúne a tu grupo y vuelve a los Reinos Olvidados en un relato de compañerismo y traición, sacrificio y supervivencia, además de la atracción de un poder absoluto.
Constituez votre groupe et retournez aux Royaumes Oubliés dans une histoire d'amitié, de trahison, de sacrifice et de survie, sur fond d'attrait du pouvoir absolu.
Stelle deine Gruppe zusammen und kehre in die Vergessenen Reiche zurück. Erlebe eine Geschichte von Freundschaft und Verrat, von Opfer und Überleben – und die Verlockung absoluter Macht.

拉瑞安工作室自豪地宣布，正基于PC和Google Stadia平台进行《博德之门3》的开发和发行工作，并与威世智的龙与地下城团队进行紧密合作。源起于目前D&D独有的机制规则与法术体系，《博德之门3》将成为这个传奇系列的正式全新篇章。

《博德之门3》将撼动RPG的上限，玩家在其中可以体验无与伦比的自由度，经历由该游戏带来的丰富故事线，同时作出高风险的决策，与独特的伙伴同游，并进行无数次难忘的战斗。这是拉瑞安工作室有史以来最大规模的作品，玩家可以和朋友们一同游玩，也能够以单人模式开始冒险。
召集你的团队，回到被遗忘的国度，开启一段记载着友谊与背叛、牺牲与生存、以及至上力量诱惑的传奇故事。

An ancient evil has returned to Baldur's Gate, intent on devouring it from the inside out. The fate of Faerun lies in your hands. Alone, you may resist. But together, you can overcome.

The land of Faerûn is in turmoil. Refugees cross the wilds, fleeing the helltorn stronghold of Elturel. A vicious cult marches across the Sword Coast, uniting every race of monsters and men under the banner of a cryptic god they call the Absolute. Chaos strikes at Faerûn's foundations, and none may escape its talons. Not even you.

The grotesque nautiloid ship appears out of nowhere, blotting out the sun. Its writhing tentacles snatch you from where you stand. The mind flayers have come, imprisoning you on their ship, infecting you with their horrid parasite. You will become one of them.

By fate or fortune, you survive when the nautiloid crashes in the Sword Coast outlands. You set out for civilisation, desperate for a cure for the parasite festering in your brain, only to take centre stage in a conspiracy that runs as deep as the Nine Hells. New enemies await.

As for old foes... the shadows stir.
And all roads lead to the legendary city of Baldur's Gate.

game.title: House Flipper
game.description: House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

localized_description.text: 《房产达人》是个能让你成为一人房屋翻新团队的独特机会。购买、整修、升级破损的房屋，赋予它们新的生命，并以更高的价格卖出！

House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

在您购买第一处房产之前，您必须想办法获得一些启动资金。不过不用担心！ 幸运的是，有很多工作触手可及！接受附近居民的任务 —— 清洁房屋、粉刷墙壁、安装暖气片、淋浴和空调，甚至为他们的房屋布置家具！ 一旦客户为您的辛勤工作付了钱，你就可以购买属于自己的房子了。
 
      
 
 拿起你的锤子！粗鲁地推倒一些墙壁！清除碎玻璃碎片、垃圾和废弃家具，为彻底将房屋改头换面做好准备！你可以满足买家的每一个要求，你也可以将房屋布置成一个舒适的办公室来发展你的业务，怎么去做取决于你自己。
 
      
 
 幸运的是你并不孤单。 最值得信赖的工具就在这里！在您的油漆滚筒、窗户清洁剂、石膏工具、拖把、锤子，当然还有强大的平板电脑的帮助下，没有任何装修任务会吓到您！使用这些工具还可以为您提供经验，你将可以升级它们并磨练您的技能，使您的工作更加愉快。
 
      
 
 无论您是打算建造梦想中的房子、帮助居民进行翻修还是单纯地喜欢破坏东西，这些都无关紧要 ——《房产达人》将帮助您放松心情。 坐下来，忘掉日常烦恼，沉浸在《房产达人》的世界中吧！

購買你的第一項房產前，先需要賺到足夠的錢。不必擔心，幸好有不少的工作！接受來自鄰里的任務：清潔他們的房屋、將牆壁塗油漆、安裝暖氣、淋浴間或冷氣、甚至布置整個房產。滿意的客戶會向你提供不錯的報酬，而你會逐漸地接近買自己的房子的目標。
 
      
 
 拿起鎚子！是時候讓自己有點骯髒，並且拆掉幾張牆壁。處理碎玻璃、垃圾、剩下的家具部件，並且準備全面改造的空間。想要達到個別客戶的所有要求還是為自己做一間十分適合自營的，舒適的辦公室，由你決定。
 
      
 
 幸好，你並不孤單。油漆滾筒、玻璃刮水器、漆刀、拖把、鎚子與可靠的平板電腦......在最忠心耿耿夥伴：即工具的幫助下，任何任務都不可怕。使用它們讓你獲得經驗以便使你的工作更加愉快。
 
      
 
 不管你打算建設夢想裡的房屋，幫助居民翻新房子還是搗毀些甚麼，《房產達人》幫你放鬆。舒服地坐下，忘記日常的煩惱，並且埋頭《房產達人》世界！

You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. 
 No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! 
 Take job offers from nearby residents - clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! 
 Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.
 
 
      
 
 Grab your hammer! It's time to take a bit of a rude approach and knock some walls down! 
 Get rid of broken glass shards, litter, and leftover pieces of furniture, to prepare the place for a complete makeover! 
 It's up to you to either meet every single requirement of specific buyers or make yourself a cozy office to grow your business in.
 
      
 
 Fortunately, you're not alone. The set of your trustiest tools is here with ya! 
 With the help of your paint roller, window cleaner, plaster tool, mop, hammer, and of course, the mighty tablet, no renovation will scare you! 
 Using those tools also gives you experience, which can be used to upgrade them and polish your skills, making your work even more pleasant.
 
      
 
 Regardless if you plan to create the house of your dreams, help the residents with their renovations or feel the need to smack some walls - 
 House Flipper is here for You! So just sit comfortably, let go off your usual daily routine, and delve into the world of House Flipper... into your world!

Antes de poder adquirir tu primera propiedad, debes ganártela. 
 No te preocupes, ¡por suerte hay mucho que hacer! Acepta ofertas de trabajo de los residentes: 
 limpia sus casas, pinta las paredes, instala calefacción, duchas y aire acondicionado, e incluso amuebla propiedades enteras. 
 Si los clientes quedan satisfechos recompensarán bien tu trabajo y cada vez estarás más cerca de comprar tu propia casa.
 
      
 
 ¡Martillo en mano! Es hora de ensuciarse un poco y tirar algunas paredes. 
 Deshazte de los trozos de vidrio, la basura, los restos de muebles y prepara el espacio para una metamorfosis completa. 
 De ti depende si quieres cumplir todos los requisitos de los compradores o prefieres organizar una oficina acogedora, 
 perfecta para administrar tu propio negocio.
 
      
 
 Por suerte, no estás solo. Un rodillo de pintura, un limpiacristales, una espátula, una fregona, un martillo y una tableta... 
 Con ayuda de tus compañeros más fieles, las herramientas, ningún pedido será terrible. 
 Con ellas podrás ganar experiencia y desarrollar habilidades, lo que hará que tu trabajo sea aún más agradable.
 
      
 
 No importa si planeas crear la casa de tus sueños, ayudar a los residentes con sus reformas o romper algo, 
 House Flipper te ayudará a relajarte. 
 ¡Siéntate, olvídeate de las preocupaciones diarias y sumérjete en el mundo de House Flipper!

Vous devrez économiser un peu avant de pouvoir acheter votre première propriété. Mais pas d'inquiétudes ! 
 Vous avez accès à de nombreuses missions ! Acceptez les contrats de vos voisins - nettoyez, peignez, installez, et meublez leur propriété ! 
 Une fois que vos clients vous auront payé pour votre dur labeur, vous pourrez acheter votre propre maison.
 
      
 
 Prenez un marteau ! Il est temps de vous défouler et de détruire quelques murs ! 
 Débarrassez-vous des débris de verre, des détritus et des vieux meubles, et préparez l'endroit pour une rénovation complète ! 
 À vous de décider si vous voulez vous plier à toutes les exigences des acheteurs, 
 ou si vous voulez vous concevoir un bureau confortable pour vous développer encore plus.
 
      
 
 Heureusement, vous n'êtes pas seul. Vous êtes accompagné d'un ensemble d'outils très fiables ! 
 Avec l'aide d'un rouleau de peinture, d'un lave-vitre, de plâtre, d'un balai, d'un marteau, 
 et bien sûr, d'une tablette, aucune rénovation ne vous fera reculer ! 
 Utiliser ces outils augmentera votre expérience, qui vous permettra de les améliorer, eux et vos compétences, rendant la tâche plus agréable.
 
      
 
 Que vous vouliez créer la maison de vos rêves, aider vos voisins à rénover leur maison, ou démolir quelques murs - House Flipper est là pour vous ! 
 Alors asseyez-vous confortablement, abandonnez votre routine habituelle, 
 et plongez dans le monde de House Flipper… dans votre monde !

Du musst dir hier zuerst einen Namen machen, bevor du deine erste Immobilie kaufen kannst. 
 Aber mach dir keine Sorgen, denn zum Glück gibt es hier mehr Arbeit als genug! 
 Nimm Jobangebote von Einwohnern in der Umgebung an - Reinigungen, Wände anstreichen, Heizungen, 
 Duschen und Klimaanlagen installieren oder sogar ganze Immobilien möblieren! 
 Sobald die dankbaren Kunden deine zuverlässige Arbeit bezahlt haben, kannst du dir ein eigenes Haus kaufen.
 
      
 
 Schnapp dir deinen Hammer, denn wir werden hart zuschlagen und ein paar Mauern zerstören! 
 Entsorge Glasscherben, Abfälle und Möbelreste, um die Immobilie auf eine Runderneuerung vorzubereiten! 
 Du musst dich entscheiden, ob du allen Bedingungen bestimmter Käufer nachkommen 
 oder dein eigenes gemütliches Büro bauen möchtest, damit dein Geschäft wachsen kann.
 
      
 
 Glücklicherweise bist du nicht alleine, denn du hast deine treuen Werkzeuge dabei! 
 Dank deiner Farbroller, Fensterputzer, Putzwerkzeuge, Wischer, Hammer - und natürlich - 
 dem mächtigen Tablet, bist du jeder Renovierung gewachsen! 
 Diese Werkzeuge bringen dir auch Erfahrungspunkte ein, damit du sie und deine Fähigkeiten verbessern kannst. 
 Dadurch wird deine Arbeit noch angenehmer.
 
      
 
 Egal ob du das Haus deiner Träume bauen, den Einwohnern bei ihren Renovierungen helfen 
 oder ein paar Wände zerstören möchtest - House Flipper ist immer für dich da! 
 Lehn dich also zurück, lass deine täglichen Routinen hinter dir und tauche in die Welt von House Flipper ein ... deiner Welt!

Para poder comprar o teu primeiro imóvel precisas ganhar um pouco de dinheiro. 
 Não te preocupes - felizmente, há muito trabalho para ti! Aceita as ofertas de emprego dos residentes da zona 
 - limpa as suas casas, pinta as paredes, faz a instalação de aquecimento, do sistema de duche ou de ar condicionado ou, 
 até mesmo, mobília casas inteiras. Os clientes satisfeitos pagaram bem pelo teu trabalho e tu, 
 com cada cheque de pagamento, estarás mais perto de comprar a tua própria casa.
 
      
 
 Apanha o martelo! Chegou a hora de te sujar e derrubar umas paredes. 
 Tira os pedaços de vidro, lixo, restos de móveis e prepara o espaço para uma metamorfose completa.
 
      
 
 Felizmente, não estás sozinho. O teu rolo de pintura, o limpa-vidros, a espátula, a esfregona, o martelo e o táblete que nunca falha... 
 Com a ajuda dos companheiros mais leais, ou seja, as tuas ferramentas, nenhum trabalho será difícil. 
 Ao usá-los ganharás experiência e melhorarás as habilidades e, assim, o teu trabalho vai tornar-se ainda mais agradável.
 
      
 
 Não importa se estás a pensar em criar a casa dos teus sonhos, ajudas os residentes a realizar renovações ou, 
 simplesmente, sentes vontade de arrebentar alguma coisa - 
 o House Flipper vai ajudar-te a relaxar. Senta-te, esqueça as tuas preocupações diárias e mergulha no mundo do House Flipper!

最初の財産を買う前に、あなたは必要なお金を稼がなければならない。
 心配しないで、儲けるチャンスは幾らでもある！例えば、地元住民からの仕事を受け入れる手がある：
 彼らの家を掃除したり、壁を塗ったり、暖房やシャワーやエアコンなど設置したりして、物件全体を整える事もあるだろう。
 満足された依頼人はあなたの働きに十分に報いるだろうから、あなたが段々自分の家を買うことに近づく。
 
      
 
 ハンマーを手に！壁数枚を壊しましょう。ガラスの破片とゴミ、家具のスクラップなどを取り除き、完全なリフォームに向けてスペースを準備する。
 個々の依頼人のすべての要件を満たしすか、あなた自身のビジネスを運営するのに最適な居心地の良いオフィスを手配したいのかはあなた次第だ。
 
      
 
 幸いなことに、あなたは一人ではない。ペイントローラーやウィンドウウォッシャー、パテナイフにモップとハンマー、そして頼もしいタブレット...　
 その全てがあなたの信用できる戦友であるツールだ。その助けがあれば、どんな注文でも問題なく完成できる。
 道具を使用すれば、経験を積み、スキルを磨くことができ、仕事が楽しくなる一方。
 
      
 
 夢の家を作ることを図っているのか、入居者をリフォームに助けたいのか、単に何かを壊したいのかは関係ない!
 『House Flipper』はあなたにリラックスさせるに違いない。
 腰を掛けて、毎日の悩みを忘れ、「House Flipper」の世界に没頭しよう！

Du skal gøre dig fortjent til det, før du køber din første ejendom. Ingen bekymringer dog! 
  Heldigvis er der masser af arbejde lige ved hånden! Tag jobtilbud fra beboere i nærheden - 
  ryd op, mal vægge, installer varmeapparater, brusere og klimaanlæg, eller indret hele deres ejendom! 
  Når de taknemmelige kunder har betalt dig for dit solide arbejde, er det tid til at få dit eget hus.
  
       
  Tag din hammer! Det er tid til at benytte en hårdhændet tilgang og smadre nogle vægge! 
  Slip af med glasskår, affald og rester af møbler for at forberede stedet til en komplet makeover! 
  Det er op til dig enten at opfylde hvert enkelt krav fra bestemte købere eller lave dig selv til et hyggeligt kontor at vokse din virksomhed i.
  
       
  Heldigvis er du ikke alene. Sættet med dine mest pålidelige værktøjer er med dig! 
  Ved hjælp af malerulle, vinduespudser, gips værktøj, moppe, hammer og selvfølgelig den mægtige tablet vil ingen renovering skræmme dig! 
  Brug af disse værktøjer giver dig også erfaring, som kan bruges til at opgradere dem og polere dine færdigheder, hvilket gør dit arbejde endnu mere behageligt.
  
       
  Det er ligegyldigt, om du planlægger at oprette dit drømmehus, hjælpe beboere med renoveringer, eller om du vil smadre noget - 
  House Flipper hjælper dig med at slappe af. 
  Læn dig tilbage, glem hverdagens bekymringer og fordyb dig i en verden af House Flipper!

Per fortuna, non sei solo. Un rullo per pittori, un lavavetri, una spatola, una scopa, un martello e un tablet affidabile ... 
  Con l'aiuto dei compagni più fedeli - strumenti - nessun ordine sarà terribile. 
  Usarli ti permetterà di acquisire esperienza e sviluppare abilità, che renderanno il tuo lavoro ancora più piacevole.
  
       
  Martello in mano! È ora di sporcarsi un po' e abbattere qualche muro. 
  Sbarazzati di schegge di vetro, spazzatura, avanzi di mobili e prepara lo spazio per una metamorfosi completa. 
  Sta a te se vuoi soddisfare tutte le esigenze dei singoli acquirenti o 
  preferisci organizzarti un ufficio accogliente, perfetto per gestire la tua attività.
  
       
  Per fortuna, non sei solo. Un rullo per pittori, un lavavetri, una spatola, una scopa, un martello e un tablet affidabile ... 
  Con l'aiuto dei compagni più fedeli - strumenti - nessun ordine sarà terribile. 
  Usarli ti permetterà di acquisire esperienza e sviluppare abilità, che renderanno il tuo lavoro ancora più piacevole.
  
       
  Non importa se hai intenzione di creare la casa dei tuoi sogni, aiutare i residenti con 
  i lavori di ristrutturazione o se vuoi rompere qualcosa - House Flipper ti aiuterà a rilassarti. 
  Accomodati, dimentica le preoccupazioni quotidiane e immergiti nel mondo di House Flipper!

game.brief: House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

game.title: Discounty
game.description: Manage your own discount supermarket! Get caught up in small-town drama, organize and plan your shop's layout, and strike lucrative trade deals as you expand your secretive aunt's business empire. Selling more frozen fries will surely heal this broken community...right?

game.title: Disco Elysium
game.description: Disco Elysium is a role-playing game developed and published by ZA/UM. It is set in the fictional city of Revachol, where players assume the role of an amnesiac detective investigating a murder case. The game emphasises dialogue and skill-based choices, with character attributes represented by internal voices that influence decisions and interactions. Its narrative explores themes of politics, philosophy, and personal identity, and it is known for its unconventional gameplay and deep storytelling.

game.title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
game.description:
Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time is a third-person puzzle-platformer and action-adventure computer and video game published by Ubisoft. It is a reboot of the landmark video game series Prince of Persia created by Jordan Mechner, who served as creative consultant, designer, and scenario writer for The Sands of Time.

King Sharaman of Persia and his son, known only as the Prince, pass through India en route to Azad and conquer a city with the aid of the local Maharajah's traitorous Vizier. During the battle the Prince seeks to win honour and glory in his first battle and heads straight to the Maharajah's treasure vaults, where he discovers the mythical Sands of Time safely contained within their Hourglass and the Dagger of Time, which he quickly learns can turn back time a short amount. When the Prince presents the dagger to his father, the traitorous Vizier demands it as payment, but is refused by King Sharaman. The Persians then continue on their journey to Azad with the wealth of prisoners taken from the Maharajah, among them the Maharajah's beautiful daughter, Princess Farah.

In Azad, the Vizier, now in the service of King Sharaman, tricks the Prince into using the Dagger to release the Sands of Time from the Hourglass. A horrific sandstorm engulfs the kingdom and the Sands of Time turn all the occupants of the palace into monsters. Only the Prince, Farah, and the Vizier remain unchanged due to their possessions; a dagger, a medallion, and a staff, respectively. Amid the catastrophe, the Vizier demands the dagger from the Prince, who refuses and manages to escape.

The Prince soon teams up with Farah in an attempt to return the Sands of Time to the Hourglass, which the Vizier moves to the top of the Tower of Dawn. As they progress through the palace the pair are constantly waylaid by Sand Monsters (including a sand-possessed King Sharaman) and the deadly network of traps set in motion in the hopes of killing the creatures. The Prince becomes steadily more worn until his princely armor is mere shreds and his body covered in bloody wounds.

While initially the Prince does not trust Farah because of the Persians' mistreatment of her, the two begin to grow closer as time goes on After a terrific battle in the ascent of the Tower of Dawn, they reach the Hourglass and are about to complete their mission when the Prince hesitates, suddenly suspicious of what Farah's motives really are. Before Farah can convince the Prince otherwise, the Vizier confronts the pair and uses his magical powers to trap Farah and the Prince in a tomb.

As they wait to die in the tomb Farah tells the Prince, who similarly reveals his claustrophobia, a story she had never told anyone before, about a time when she was little, when her mother told her about a secret magic word which would help her escape anything that scared her: "Kakolookia".

As soon as the Prince repeats the word, as if by magic, the Prince finds himself in a mysterious tunnel which winds down into a dreamlike bathhouse that resembles the magic fountains that the Prince earlier used to increase his health. There he meets Farah inviting him to join her bath; as they bathe, the Prince and Farah finally make love and find comfort in each other amid their perilous situation. When the Prince awakens afterwards, he finds himself back in the tomb and discovers that the magical cavern was just a dream, but he believed that Farah had shared it as well. However Farah, the Dagger, and his sword are gone, leaving him with only Farah's medallion to protect him from the Sands of Time.

The Prince, having found a new sword which destroys the sand monsters on contact, pursues and catches up to Farah once more atop the Tower of Dawn, which he must climb from the outside. When the Prince finally reaches the top, he finds Farah being overwhelmed by the sand monsters and she dangles over a cliff by the Dagger, while the Prince grab the blade; and Farah, realizing that the Prince will die to save her, instead sacrifices herself and lets go of the Dagger; and true to the game's prophecy "if you want to live, die in love" she falls to her death in the Hourglass room below. The Prince then tries to use the dagger to save her, but finds the sand-tanks empty since Farah had used them all. Enraged by his lover's death, the Prince uses the Dagger to massacre the last of the sand monsters in the tower and descends to weep over Farah's body. As the Prince mourns, the Vizier emerges from the shadows and offers the Prince a partnership in his evil plan, promising him eternal life; however the Prince angrily refuses because those he loved had died, and before the Vizier can stop him, the Prince drives the Dagger of Time into the Hourglass, rewinding time to the night before the invasion of the Maharajah's kingdom. The Prince awakens, still with the Dagger of Time, and secretly finds his way to Farah's bedroom, where he tells her the whole story, which she does not remember as it had not happened yet. However, the Vizier discovers the Prince, and fearing his planned treachery already revealed, attempts to kill both Farah and the Prince, telling that he suffered from consumption and would die in any event and that his plan was to cure his imminent death with eternal life. In the ensuing battle the Prince kills the Vizier. He then returns the Dagger of Time to Farah, who asks why the Prince invented such an unbelievable story to prove the Vizier's treachery. The Prince then kisses Farah, hoping she'll remember; but she rebuffs his advance, and so the Prince uses the dagger to erase the kiss, and instead he falsely tells her that it was just a story. But when Farah asks the Prince his name, he replies, "Just call me Kakolookia", before departing, leaving Farah amazed.

game.title: Super Smash Bros.
game.description: Super Smash Bros. is a crossover fighting video game between several different Nintendo franchises, and the first installment in the Super Smash Bros. series. Players must defeat their opponents multiple times in a fighting frenzy of items and power-ups. Super Smash Bros. is a departure from the general genre of fighting games: instead of depleting an opponent's life bar, the players seek to knock opposing characters off a stage. Each player has a damage total, represented by a percentage, which rises as the damage is taken.

Each player has a damage total, represented by a percentage, which rises as the damage is taken.

game.title: Coridden
game.description: Become the beasts you defeat in this action-packed RPG! Equip and upgrade both your human and beast form and shapeshift between them anytime. Venture out solo or ride together in co-op on a journey to uncover the dark secrets sealed away inside a legendary city.

localized_description.text: Become the beasts you defeat in this action-packed RPG! Equip and upgrade both your human and beast form and shapeshift between them anytime. Venture out solo or ride together in co-op on a journey to uncover the dark secrets sealed away inside a legendary city.

game.title: Immortals Fenyx Rising
game.description:
From the creators of Assassin’s Creed Odyssey comes a storybook adventure about a forgotten hero on a quest to save the Greek gods.

Embark on a journey to the Isle of the Blessed, taken over by dangerous creatures of mythology. Prove your legendary heroism by taking on their leader, Typhon, the deadliest monster in all of mythology in a face-off for the ages.
Explore a beautiful fantasy world where tricky puzzles, mysterious dungeons and heroic feats await. The journey will be as challenging and rewarding as the final destination.
Will you be the Hero of the legends foretold?

localized_title.text: 渡神紀 芬尼克斯傳說
イモータルズ フィニクス ライジング

localized_description.text:
From the creators of Assassin’s Creed Odyssey comes a storybook adventure about a forgotten hero on a quest to save the Greek gods.

Embark on a journey to the Isle of the Blessed, taken over by dangerous creatures of mythology. Prove your legendary heroism by taking on their leader, Typhon, the deadliest monster in all of mythology in a face-off for the ages.
Explore a beautiful fantasy world where tricky puzzles, mysterious dungeons and heroic feats await. The journey will be as challenging and rewarding as the final destination.
Will you be the Hero of the legends foretold?

Gold Edition   
 
  关于游戏 你就是众神最后的希望。
 
 你将作为主角芬尼斯，拯救陷入黑暗诅咒的希腊诸神。
 挑战神话中的野兽，掌握众神的传奇力量，并在一场史诗大战中对阵堤丰——希腊神话中最危险的泰坦。
 
 挑战传说中的怪物
 独眼巨人，美杜莎，米诺陶洛斯……你将面对神话怪物，并在快节奏的空中战与白刃战中，灵活运用众神赐予你的能力与武器，与他们激烈交锋。
 
 驱使天神之力
 奥林匹斯山的众神赐福于你。你将使用他们的能力斩奸除恶，解决上古谜题，并探索这个宏大的世界。

Gold Edition   
 
  關於此遊戲 你是眾神的最後希望。
 
 扮演芬尼克斯，踏上拯救希臘眾神脫離黑暗詛咒的任務。
 與神話怪獸交手、精通眾神的傳奇力量，並在千古來最史詩級的戰鬥中，對抗希臘神話最致命的巨人「堤豐」。
 
 面對神話敵人
 面對如「獨眼巨人」、「梅杜莎」或「牛頭人」等傳奇怪獸，結合你的神賜能力以及武器，與牠們進行快節奏的空中近戰。
 
 施展眾神力量
 奧林帕斯眾神為你帶來祝福之禮。使用它們來對抗神話怪獸、解開古老謎團，並探索遼闊的開放世界。

Gold Edition   
 
  About the Game YOU ARE THE GODS' LAST HOPE.
 
 Play as Fenyx on a quest to save the Greek gods from a dark curse. 
 Take on mythological beasts, master the legendary powers of the gods, and defeat Typhon, the deadliest Titan in Greek mythology, in an epic fight for the ages.
 
 CONFRONT MYTHOLOGICAL ENEMIES
 Face off against legendary beasts like Cyclops, Medusa, or Minotaur, and confront them in fast-paced aerial and melee combat, combining your god-given abilities and weapons.
 
 WIELD THE POWER OF GODS
 The gods of Olympus have blessed you with gifts. Use them to fight mythical monsters, solve ancient puzzles, and explore the vast open world.

Gold Edition   
 
  Acerca del juego ERES LA ÚLTIMA ESPERANZA DE LOS DIOSES
 
 Ponte en la piel de Fenyx y salva a los dioses griegos de una tenebrosa maldición. 
 Enfréntate a bestias mitológicas, domina los poderes legendarios de los dioses y derrota a Tifón, el titán más terrorífico de la mitología griega, en una lucha épica que pasará a la historia.
 
 ENFRÉNTATE A ENEMIGOS MÍTICOS
 Pelea contra Medusa, Minotauro o cíclopes extraídos de las leyendas en trepidantes combates aéreos y cuerpo a cuerpo en los que tendrás que combinar tus armas con las habilidades que te otorgarán los dioses.
 
 BLANDE EL PODER DE LOS DIOSES
 Los dioses del Olimpo te cubrirán de bendiciones. Utilízalas para enfrentarte a animales mitológicos, resolver rompecabezas antiquísimos y explorar un inmenso mundo abierto.

Gold Edition   
 
  À propos du jeu VOUS ÊTES LE DERNIER ESPOIR DES DIEUX.
 
 Incarnez Fenyx, dont la tâche est de sauver les dieux grecs d'une sombre malédiction. 
 Affrontez des créatures mythiques, maîtrisez les légendaires pouvoirs des dieux et triomphez de Typhon, le titan le plus meurtrier de la mythologie grecque lors d'un combat épique qui restera dans les mémoires.
 
 AFFRONTEZ DES ENNEMIS MYTHOLOGIQUES
 Affrontez des créatures mythiques telles que des cyclopes, Méduse ou le Minotaure lors d'intenses combats au corps à corps et aériens, en combinant armes et aptitudes reçues des dieux.
 
 MANIEZ LE POUVOIR DES DIEUX
 Les dieux de l'Olympe vous ont fait des présents. Utilisez-les pour combattre les monstres mythiques, résoudre des énigmes antiques et explorer le vaste monde ouvert.

Gold Edition   
 
  Über das Spiel DU BIST DIE LETZTE HOFFNUNG DER GÖTTER.
 
 Spiele als Fenyx und rette die griechischen Götter vor einem dunklen Fluch. 
 Nimm es mit mythischen Kreaturen auf, meistere göttliche Kräfte und bezwinge Typhon, den tödlichsten Titanen der griechischen Mythologie, in einem epischen, alles entscheidenden Kampf.
 
 STELLE DICH MYTHISCHEN GEGNERN
 Kämpfe in rasanten Luft- und Nahkämpfen, in denen du deine gottgegebenen Fähigkeiten und Waffen kombinieren musst, gegen legendäre mythische Wesen wie Zyklopen, die Medusa oder den Minotauros.
 
 NUTZE DIE MACHT DER GÖTTER
 Nutze die Gaben der Götter des Olymp, um mythische Monster zu bezwingen, uralte Rätsel zu meistern und die riesige Spielwelt zu erkunden.

Gold Edition   
 
  Acerca do jogo TU ÉS A ÚLTIMA ESPERANÇA DOS DEUSES.
 
 Joga como Fenyx numa missão para salvar os deuses gregos de uma terrível maldição. 
 Enfrenta monstros mitológicos, domina os poderes lendários dos deuses e derrota Typhon, o mais poderoso titã da mitologia grega, numa luta épica que ficará para a História.
 
 ENFRENTA INIMIGOS MITOLÓGICOS
 Defronta monstros lendários como o Ciclope, a Medusa ou o Minotauro em combates frenéticos aéreos ou corpo a corpo enquanto combinas as tuas capacidades e armas divinas.
 
 RECORRE AO PODER DOS DEUSES
 Os deuses do Olimpo abençoaram-te com os seus dons. Usa-os para combateres contra monstros míticos, resolveres quebra-cabeças e explorares o vasto mundo aberto.

Gold Edition   
 
  ゲームについて 神々の最後の希望は君だ。
 
 フィニクスとなり、ギリシャ神話の神々を闇の呪いから救う旅に出よう。 
 神々の力を使いこなし、神話の怪物に立ち向かえ。ギリシャ神話最凶の巨人であるテュポンを打ち倒して歴史に名を刻もう。
 
 神話の敵に立ち向かおう
 サイクロプス、メデューサ、ミノタウロスといった伝説の怪物たちに立ち向かえ。神から授かったアビリティや武器を駆使し、テンポの良い戦闘システムで空中戦や近接戦闘を繰り広げよう。
 
 神々の力を借りよう
 オリンポスの神々から授かった祝福をうまく使いこなし、神話の怪物と戦い、古代のパズルを解き、広大なオープンワールドを探索しよう。

Gold Edition   
 
  About the Game YOU ARE THE GODS' LAST HOPE.
 
 Play as Fenyx on a quest to save the Greek gods from a dark curse. 
 Take on mythological beasts, master the legendary powers of the gods, and defeat Typhon, the deadliest Titan in Greek mythology, in an epic fight for the ages.
 
 CONFRONT MYTHOLOGICAL ENEMIES
 Face off against legendary beasts like Cyclops, Medusa, or Minotaur, and confront them in fast-paced aerial and melee combat, combining your god-given abilities and weapons.
 
 WIELD THE POWER OF GODS
 The gods of Olympus have blessed you with gifts. Use them to fight mythical monsters, solve ancient puzzles, and explore the vast open world.

Gold Edition     
 
  About the Game YOU ARE THE GODS' LAST HOPE.
 
 Play as Fenyx on a quest to save the Greek gods from a dark curse. 
 Take on mythological beasts, master the legendary powers of the gods, and defeat Typhon, the deadliest Titan in Greek mythology, in an epic fight for the ages.
 
 CONFRONT MYTHOLOGICAL ENEMIES
 Face off against legendary beasts like Cyclops, Medusa, or Minotaur, and confront them in fast-paced aerial and melee combat, combining your god-given abilities and weapons.
 
 WIELD THE POWER OF GODS
 The gods of Olympus have blessed you with gifts. Use them to fight mythical monsters, solve ancient puzzles, and explore the vast open world.

Gold Edition     
 
  Acerca del juego ERES LA ÚLTIMA ESPERANZA DE LOS DIOSES
 
 Ponte en la piel de Fenyx y salva a los dioses griegos de una tenebrosa maldición. 
 Enfréntate a bestias mitológicas, domina los poderes legendarios de los dioses y derrota a Tifón, el titán más terrorífico de la mitología griega, en una lucha épica que pasará a la historia.
 
 ENFRÉNTATE A ENEMIGOS MÍTICOS
 Pelea contra Medusa, Minotauro o cíclopes extraídos de las leyendas en trepidantes combates aéreos y cuerpo a cuerpo en los que tendrás que combinar tus armas con las habilidades que te otorgarán los dioses.
 
 BLANDE EL PODER DE LOS DIOSES
 Los dioses del Olimpo te cubrirán de bendiciones. Utilízalas para enfrentarte a animales mitológicos, resolver rompecabezas antiquísimos y explorar un inmenso mundo abierto.

Gold Edition     
 
  À propos du jeu VOUS ÊTES LE DERNIER ESPOIR DES DIEUX.
 
 Incarnez Fenyx, dont la tâche est de sauver les dieux grecs d'une sombre malédiction. 
 Affrontez des créatures mythiques, maîtrisez les légendaires pouvoirs des dieux et triomphez de Typhon, le titan le plus meurtrier de la mythologie grecque lors d'un combat épique qui restera dans les mémoires.
 
 AFFRONTEZ DES ENNEMIS MYTHOLOGIQUES
 Affrontez des créatures mythiques telles que des cyclopes, Méduse ou le Minotaure lors d'intenses combats au corps à corps et aériens, en combinant armes et aptitudes reçues des dieux.
 
 MANIEZ LE POUVOIR DES DIEUX
 Les dieux de l'Olympe vous ont fait des présents. Utilisez-les pour combattre les monstres mythiques, résoudre des énigmes antiques et explorer le vaste monde ouvert.

Gold Edition     
 
  Infos zum Spiel DU BIST DIE LETZTE HOFFNUNG DER GÖTTER.
 
 Spiele als Fenyx und rette die griechischen Götter vor einem dunklen Fluch. 
 Nimm es mit mythischen Kreaturen auf, meistere göttliche Kräfte und bezwinge Typhon, den tödlichsten Titanen der griechischen Mythologie, in einem epischen, alles entscheidenden Kampf.
 
 STELLE DICH MYTHISCHEN GEGNERN
 Kämpfe in rasanten Luft- und Nahkämpfen, in denen du deine gottgegebenen Fähigkeiten und Waffen kombinieren musst, gegen legendäre mythische Wesen wie Zyklopen, die Medusa oder den Minotauros.
 
 NUTZE DIE MACHT DER GÖTTER
 Nutze die Gaben der Götter des Olymp, um mythische Monster zu bezwingen, uralte Rätsel zu meistern und die riesige Spielwelt zu erkunden.

Gold Edition     
 
  Acerca do jogo TU ÉS A ÚLTIMA ESPERANÇA DOS DEUSES.
 
 Joga como Fenyx numa missão para salvar os deuses gregos de uma terrível maldição. 
 Enfrenta monstros mitológicos, domina os poderes lendários dos deuses e derrota Typhon, o mais poderoso titã da mitologia grega, numa luta épica que ficará para a História.
 
 ENFRENTA INIMIGOS MITOLÓGICOS
 Defronta monstros lendários como o Ciclope, a Medusa ou o Minotauro em combates frenéticos aéreos ou corpo a corpo enquanto combinas as tuas capacidades e armas divinas.
 
 RECORRE AO PODER DOS DEUSES
 Os deuses do Olimpo abençoaram-te com os seus dons. Usa-os para combateres contra monstros míticos, resolveres quebra-cabeças e explorares o vasto mundo aberto.

Gold Edition     
 
  Om spillet DU ER GUDERNES SIDSTE HÅB.
 
 Spil Fenix, der drager ud for at redde de græske guder fra en dyster forbandelse. 
 Kæmp mod mytologiske væsener, bliv herre over gudernes legendariske kræfter, og nedkæmp Typhon, den mest dødbringende titan i den græske mytologi, i en episk sagnkamp.
 
 KONFRONTÉR MYTOLOGISKE FJENDER
 Kæmp mod legendariske væsener som kyklopen, Medusa eller minotauren i hæsblæsende luft- og nærkampe, hvor du kombinerer dine guddommelige evner og våben.
 
 BRUG GUDERNES KRÆFTER
 Olympens guder har velsignet dig med gaver. Brug dem til at kæmpe mod mytiske uhyrer, løse ældgamle hovedbrud og udforske den enorme åbne verden.

Gold Edition     
 
  Informazioni sul gioco SEI L'ULTIMA SPERANZA DEGLI DEI.
 
 Nei panni di Fenyx, affronta una missione per salvare gli dei della Grecia da un'oscura maledizione. 
 Combatti contro mostri mitologici, padroneggia i leggendari poteri degli dei e sconfiggi Tifone, il più terribile Titano della mitologia Greca, in uno scontro epico.
 
 SFIDA NEMICI MITOLOGICI
 Affronta mostri leggendari come il Ciclope, Medusa o il Minotauro in frenetici combattimenti aerei e corpo a corpo, utilizzando le armi e le abilità che ti hanno donato gli dei.
 
 SPRIGIONA LA POTENZA DEGLI DEI
 Gli dei dell'Olimpo ti hanno fatto dei doni. Usali per affrontare mostri mitologici, risolvere antichi enigmi ed esplorare un vasto mondo aperto.

game.brief:
From the creators of Assassin’s Creed Odyssey comes a storybook adventure about a forgotten hero on a quest to save the Greek gods.

Embark on a journey to the Isle of the Blessed, taken over by dangerous creatures of mythology. Prove your legendary heroism by taking on their leader, Typhon, the deadliest monster in all of mythology in a face-off for the ages.
Explore a beautiful fantasy world where tricky puzzles, mysterious dungeons and heroic feats await. The journey will be as challenging and rewarding as the final destination.
Will you be the Hero of the legends foretold?

game.title: Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden
game.description:
Hunt ghosts as two memorable characters in a story driven Action-RPG where your decisions have dramatic consequences. Solve haunting cases and battle supernatural forces combining Antea’s spiritual powers and Red’s arsenal.

New Eden, 1695. Antea Duarte and Red mac Raith are lovers and Banishers, ghost-hunters who vowed to protect the living from the threat of lingering ghosts and specters. Following a disastrous last mission, Antea is fatally wounded, becoming one of the spirits she loathes. In the haunted wilds of North America, the couple desperately searches for a way to liberate Antea from her new plight.

jogo eletrônico de 2024, desenvolvido pela Don't Nod

Hunt ghosts as two memorable characters in a story-driven Action-RPG where your decisions carry dramatic consequences. Torn between honoring your oath to the living and saving your departed partner, how far will you go for love?

New Eden, 1695. Antea Duarte and Red mac Raith are lovers and Banishers, ghost-hunters who vowed to protect the living from the threat of lingering ghosts and specters. Following a disastrous last mission, Antea is fatally wounded, becoming one of the spirits she loathes. In the haunted wilds of North America, the couple desperately searches for a way to liberate Antea from her new plight.

Immerse yourself in a beautiful, intimate and powerful story between two fated lovers. As Banishers, enter the lives of New Eden’s communities and solve haunting cases in a mystical, lore-rich world plagued with supernatural creatures and ancient secrets. Use your wits or combine Antea’s spiritual powers and Red’s arsenal to defeat and banish the souls tormenting the living.

Challenging decisions will lay on your path, dramatically impacting your story and the fate of New Eden’s inhabitants— be they living people or wandering souls. How much will you compromise your ghost-hunting vow for the sake of your lover who became one of such spirits?

game.title: Middle-earth: Shadow of War
game.description:
Go behind enemy lines to forge your army, conquer Fortresses and dominate Mordor from within. Experience how the award winning Nemesis System creates unique personal stories with every enemy and follower, and confront the full power of the Dark Lord Sauron and his Ringwraiths in this epic new story of Middle-earth. 

In Middle-earth: Shadow of War™, nothing will be forgotten.

localized_title.text: La Tierra Media: Sombras de Guerra
La Terre du Milieu : L'Ombre de la Guerre
Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra della Guerra

localized_description.text:
深入敌后，组建军队，攻破要塞，从内部统治魔多。体验我们荣膺嘉奖的宿敌系统打造出的独一无二的个性剧情，每一个敌人和追随者都充满新意，正面对抗强大无比的黑暗魔君索伦和他的戒灵，尽在这个鸿篇巨制的中土游戏。 
 

 
《中土世界™ : 战争之影™》，一切将被永恒铭记。

潛入敵軍陣線後方打造你的軍隊、征服堡壘，並從內部支配魔多。體驗獲獎的宿敵系統，如何運用每一位敵人和屬下來建立獨特的個人故事，並在中土世界的全新史詩故事中，面對黑暗魔君索倫和他的戒靈。 
 

 
在《中土世界™：戰爭之影™》，宿敵恩怨、從未遺忘。

Go behind enemy lines to forge your army, conquer Fortresses and dominate Mordor from within. Experience how the award winning Nemesis System creates unique personal stories with every enemy and follower, and confront the full power of the Dark Lord Sauron and his Ringwraiths in this epic new story of Middle-earth. 

In Middle-earth: Shadow of War™, nothing will be forgotten.

Actúa en territorio enemigo para forjar tu ejército, conquistar fortalezas y dominar Mordor desde dentro. Comprueba cómo el galardonado sistema Némesis crea historias personales únicas con cada enemigo y seguidor, y enfréntate al increíble poder del Señor Oscuro, Sauron, y sus Espectros del Anillo en esta nueva y épica historia de la Tierra Media. 

En La Tierra Media: Sombras de Guerra nada caerá en el olvido.

Allez derrière les lignes ennemies pour former votre armée, prenez le contrôle des forteresses et dominez le Mordor de l'intérieur. Découvrez comment le système Nemesis récompensé crée des histoires personnelles et uniques avec chaque ennemi et chaque partisan et affrontez la pleine puissance du Seigneur des Ténèbres Sauron et de ses Nazgûl dans cette nouvelle histoire épique de la Terre du Milieu. 

Dans La Terre du Milieu : L'Ombre de la Guerre, rien ne sera oublié.

Gehe hinter die feindlichen Linien, um eine Armee aufzustellen, Festungen zu erobern und Mordor von innen heraus zu beherrschen. Erlebe, wie das preisgekrönte Erzfeind-System mit jedem Feind und jedem Gefolgsmann einzigartige persönliche Geschichten erschafft und stelle dich in dieser epischen neuen Geschichte aus Mittelerde der ganzen Macht des Dunklen Herrschers Sauron und seiner Ringgeister.

Mittelerde: Schatten des Krieges - Nichts wird vergessen.

Esgueira-te por trás das linhas do inimigo para criar um exército, conquistar Fortalezas e dominar Mordor desde o seu interior. Vê como o premiado Sistema Nemesis cria histórias pessoais únicas com cada inimigo e seguidor, e enfrenta todo o poder do Senhor das Trevas Sauron e dos seus Espectros do Anel nesta épica nova história em Terra-Média. 
 

 
Em Middle-earth: Shadow of War, nada será esquecido.

敵陣に深く入り込んで軍隊を組織し、砦を制圧してモルドールを内側から支配しよう。数々の賞を受賞したネメシスシステムによって、一人ひとりの敵や支持者との間に独自の物語が形成される。壮大な中つ国を舞台に、強大な力を持つ冥王サウロンと指輪の幽鬼に挑もう。
 

 
シャドウ・オブ・ウォー、やつらは決して忘れない。

Go behind enemy lines to forge your army, conquer Fortresses and dominate Mordor from within. Experience how the award winning Nemesis System creates unique personal stories with every enemy and follower, and confront the full power of the Dark Lord Sauron and his Ringwraiths in this epic new story of Middle-earth. 
 

 
In Middle-earth: Shadow of War, nothing will be forgotten.

Gå om bag fjendens linjer for at opbygge din hær, erobre fæstninger og herske over Mordor. Oplev, hvordan det prisvindende Nemesis-system skaber personlige historier for hver fjende og følgesvend, og kæmp mod den mørke Sauron og hans ringånders fulde styrke i dette nye eventyr fra Midgård. 

I Middle-earth: Shadow of War bliver intet glemt.

Supera le linee nemiche per forgiare il tuo esercito, conquistare le Fortezze e dominare Mordor dall'interno. Scopri in che modo l'apprezzatissimo Sistema Nemesi riesca a creare storie personali uniche per ogni nemico e seguace e affronta l'immane potere dell'Oscuro Signore Sauron e dei suoi Spettri dell'Anello in questa nuova, epica storia della Terra di Mezzo. 

In La Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra della Guerra, nulla sarà dimenticato.
畅玩《演示版中土世界™: 战争之影™》！首度体验这个荣膺嘉奖的宿敌系统。勇敢地挫败不可一世的领主并征服他们的堡垒。突破其部队的重重防守、支配他的队长并建立你自己的军团。完成演示版后，将你的领主转移到《中土世界™: 战争之影™》中，便可使其助你一同对抗索伦。探索诺恩地区，并踏上掌控全魔多的征途。
歡迎來玩《中土世界™：戰爭之影™》演示版！初次體驗受到大獎肯定的「宿敵系統」。打敗令人聞風喪膽的大王、征服他們的堡壘、瓦解他的軍團、支配敵方隊長、打造我方軍隊。演示版結束後，把你的大王傳送到《中土世界™：戰爭之影™》，讓他們協助你一同對抗索倫。立刻探索諾恩區域，勇闖魔多大地。

Play the Demo for Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™! Experience your first taste of the award-winning Nemesis System. Face down the dreaded overlord and conquer their fortress. Work your way through his forces, dominating his captains and build your own army. After completing the Demo, transfer your Overlord into Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™ where they can aid you in the fight against Sauron. Explore the region of Nûrn and take the leap into the land of Mordor.

¡Juega a la demo de La Tierra Media™: Sombras de Guerra™ y vive la experiencia del galardonado sistema Némesis! Haz frente al temible señor y conquista su fortaleza. Domina a sus capitanes para hacerte con sus fuerzas y forja tu propio ejército. Tras completar la demo, podrás transferir a tu señor a La Tierra Media™: Sombras de Guerra™, donde te ayudará a enfrentarte a Sauron. Explora la región de Núrnen y da un salto a la tierra de Mordor.

Jouez à la Démo de La Terre du Milieu™: L''Ombre de la Guerre™! Initiez-vous au système Nemesis récompensé. Tenez tête au redoutable Chef Suprême et prenez sa forteresse. Détruisez ses forces, dominez ses capitaines et forgez votre propre armée. Une fois la Démo terminée, envoyez votre Chef Suprême dans La Terre du Milieu™: L'Ombre de la Guerre™ là où il vous sera utile contre Sauron. Explorez la région de Núrn et avancez dans le Mordor.

Spiele die Demo für Mittelerde™: Schatten des Krieges™! Erlebe deinen ersten Vorgeschmack auf das preisgekrönte Erzfeind-System. Stelle dich dem gefürchteten Oberherrn und erobere seine Festung. Arbeite dich durch seine Truppen, beherrsche seine Hauptmänner und versammle deine eigene Armee. Bring deinen Oberherrn nach Abschluss der Demo zur kompletten Version von Mittelerde™: Schatten des Krieges™, wo er dir im Kampf gegen Sauron helfen kann. Erkunde das Gebiet Nurn und mache einen Sprung nach Mordor.

Joga a Demo de Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™! Prova esta primeira amostra do premiado Sistema Nemesis. Confronta o temível Overlord e conquista a sua fortaleza. Derrota as suas forças, domina os seus capitães e constrói o teu próprio exército. Quando terminares a Demo, transfere o teu Overlord para o Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™, onde te poderá ajudar na luta contra Sauron. Explora a região de Nûrn e aventura-te nas terras de Mordor.
シャドウ・オブ・ウォーの体験版をプレイしよう！ 数々の賞を受賞したネメシスシステムを体感しながら、恐ろしい首領と戦い、砦を制圧しよう。小隊長を支配し、自分だけの軍隊を作りあげて敵の軍勢を退けろ。体験版のクリア後は、シャドウ・オブ・ウォーの製品版に自分の首領を引き継いで、共にサウロンに挑むことが可能。ヌアンの地域を探索し、モルドールの地に飛び込もう

Play the Demo for Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™! Experience your first taste of the award-winning Nemesis System. Face down the dreaded overlord and conquer their fortress. Work your way through his forces, dominating his captains and build your own army. After completing the Demo, transfer your Overlord into Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™ where they can aid you in the fight against Sauron. Explore the region of Nûrn and take the leap into the land of Mordor.

game.title: Kingdom Two Crowns
game.description:
10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  About the Game        
    Build - Explore - Defend - Conquer    
  A shroud of mystery envelops these uncharted medieval lands where ancient monuments, relics and mythical creatures await. Echoes of bygone eras speak of past greatness and in Kingdom Two Crowns, part of the award-winning franchise Kingdom, you embark on an adventure as the Monarch. In this side-scrolling journey atop your steed, you recruit loyal subjects, build your kingdom and protect your crown from the Greed, monstrous creatures looking to steal your kingdom's treasures.  
  Journey alone or together - in Kingdom Two Crowns, a duo of Monarchs can work cooperatively to build and forge a Kingdom that stands the test of time.   
        
  Lay the foundation of a mighty Kingdom with towering walls and protecting towers while cultivating prosperity through building farms and recruiting villagers. In Kingdom Two Crowns expanding and growing your Kingdom grants access to new units and technologies.   
        
  Venture into the unknown beyond the protection of your borders, through secluded forests and ancient ruins to seek treasures and hidden knowledge to aid your quest. Who knows what legendary artifacts or mythological beings you will find.  
        
  As the night falls, shadows come to life and the monstrous Greed assaults your kingdom. Rally your troops, muster your courage, and steel yourself, for each night will demand ever-growing feats of tactical mastermind. Deploy archers, knights, siege weapons, and even newfound Monarch abilities and artifacts to hold against the waves of Greed.  
        
  As the monarch, lead assaults against the source of the Greed to secure your islands. Send your groups of soldiers to clash with the enemy. A word of caution: make sure your troops are prepared and sufficient in numbers, as the Greed will not go down without a fight.   
        
  Kingdom Two Crowns is an evolving experience that includes several free content updates:   
     Shogun:  Journey to lands inspired by the architecture and culture of feudal Japan. Play as the mighty Shogun or Onna-bugeisha, enlist the ninja, lead your soldiers to battle atop the mythological Kirin, and form new strategies as you brave the Greed hiding in thick bamboo forests.  
     Dead Lands:  Enter the dark lands of Kingdom. Play as unique Monarchs, including the Shardbinder Miriam, with powerful traits from the gothic horror action-RPG Bloodstained. Ride the gigantic beetle to lay out traps, the eerie undead steed that summons barriers impeding the progress of the Greed, or the mythical demon horse Gamigin from Bloodstained, with its powerful charge attack.   
     Challenge Islands:  Representing the greatest challenge ever seen for hardened veteran monarchs.  Take on five challenges with different rules and objectives. Can you survive long enough to claim the gold crown?  
    Your adventure is only the beginning. Explore more untold stories and settings in the additional DLCs and content available for the game. Oh Monarch, stay vigilant for dark nights are still to come, protect your crown!

  Kingdom Two Crowns is an evolving experience that includes several free content updates:   
     Shogun:  Journey to lands inspired by the architecture and culture of feudal Japan. Play as the mighty Shogun or Onna-bugeisha, enlist the ninja, lead your soldiers to battle atop the mythological Kirin, and form new strategies as you brave the Greed hiding in thick bamboo forests.  
     Dead Lands:  Enter the dark lands of Kingdom. Play as unique Monarchs, including the Shardbinder Miriam, with powerful traits from the gothic horror action-RPG Bloodstained. Ride the gigantic beetle to lay out traps, the eerie undead steed that summons barriers impeding the progress of the Greed, or the mythical demon horse Gamigin from Bloodstained, with its powerful charge attack.   
     Challenge Islands:  Representing the greatest challenge ever seen for hardened veteran monarchs.  Take on five challenges with different rules and objectives. Can you survive long enough to claim the gold crown?  
    Your adventure is only the beginning. Explore more untold stories and settings in the additional DLCs and content available for the game. Oh Monarch, stay vigilant for dark nights are still to come, protect your crown!

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  Acerca del juego        
   Construye - Explora - Defiende - Conquista 
  Un manto de misterio envuelve estas inexploradas tierras medievales en las que convergen reliquias, monumentos antiguos y criaturas míticas. Los ecos de eras pasadas cuentan historias de grandeza y, en Kingdom Two Crowns, que pertenece a la galardonada franquicia Kingdom, puedes vivir esta aventura poniéndote en el papel de monarca. En este viaje con desplazamiento lateral a lomos de tu corcel, podrás reclutar a leales súbditos, construir tu propio reino y proteger la corona de los ávidos, unas monstruosas criaturas que intentar robar los tesoros del reino.
  Afronta este viaje a solas o en compañía. En Kingdom Two Crowns, un dúo de monarcas puede cooperar para construir y forjar un reino que perdure por los siglos de los siglos.
        
  Pon los cimientos de un poderoso reino con muros altos y torres de defensa, y hazlo prosperar construyendo granjas y reclutando aldeanos. En Kingdom Two Crowns, expandir y desarrollar tu reino te dará acceso a nuevas unidades y tecnologías.
        
  Abandona la seguridad de tus fronteras y adéntrate en lo desconocido. Recorre bosques solitarios y ruinas antiguas en busca de tesoros y sabiduría oculta que te ayudarán en tu misión. ¿Qué artefactos legendarios y seres mitológicos encontrarás por el camino?
        
  Al caer la noche, las sombras cobran vida y los monstruosos ávidos atacan tu reino. Reúne a tus tropas y ármate de valor, pues todas noches deberás demostrar un nivel de habilidad estratégica mayor que el día anterior. Para resistir a las oleadas de ávidos, tendrás que desplegar arqueros, caballeros y armas de asedio, además de hacer uso de las habilidades y artefactos que solo tú posees como monarca.
        
  Como monarca, deberás organizar asaltos contra el lugar de origen de los ávidos para proteger tu isla. Envía grupos de soldados para que luchen frente a frente con el enemigo. Como medida de precaución, procura asegurarte de que tus tropas estén preparadas y sean suficientes en número; los ávidos no se rinden ante nada.
        
  Kingdom Two Crowns es una experiencia en constante evolución que incluye varias actualizaciones de contenido gratuitas:
     Shogun : Viaja a tierras inspiradas en la arquitectura y la cultura del Japón feudal. Juega como un poderoso shogun o una onna-bugeisha, consigue el apoyo de los ninja, guía a tus soldados a la batalla a lomos de un mítico quilin, e idea nuevas estrategias mientras te enfrentas a los ávidos escondidos entre los densos bosques de bambú.
     Dead Lands : Adéntrate en las tierras más oscuras de Kingdom. Juega como varios monarcas únicos, incluida la unefragmentos Miriam, con poderosos rasgos inspirados en el RPG de acción y horror gótico Bloodstained.
     Islas de desafíos : Hasta los monarcas curtidos en mil batallas tendrán que esforzarse al máximo para superar este reto. Acepta cinco desafíos con distintas normas y objetivos. ¿Serás capaz de sobrevivir el tiempo necesario para hacerte con la corona de oro?
    Tu aventura es solo el principio. Explora más historias sin contar y ubicaciones sin descubrir con todo el contenido descargable adicional disponible para el juego. ¡Oh, monarca, no bajes la guardia ni un segundo! ¡Te esperan muchas noches oscuras y es tu deber proteger la corona!

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  À propos du jeu        
   Bâtir - Explorer - Défendre - Conquérir  
  Un voile de mystère recouvre ces terres médiévales inexplorées où vous attendent monuments antiques, reliques mystérieuses et créatures mythiques. Les échos d'époques lointaines sont empreints de gloire perdue, et avec Kingdom Two Crowns, nouveau titre de la série primée Kingdom, vous embarquez dans une nouvelle aventure en tant que monarque. Dans ce périple en défilement latéral, vous recruterez de loyaux sujets, bâtirez votre royaume et protégerez votre couronne contre les Rapaces, des créatures monstrueuses avides de trésors.
  Voyagez seul ou à deux. Dans Kingdom Two Crowns, un duo de monarques peut coopérer pour bâtir et forger un royaume à l'épreuve du temps.  
        
  Posez les bases d'un puissant royaume en érigeant de hautes murailles et des tours défensives, et assurez votre prospérité en construisant des fermes et en recrutant des villageois. Dans Kingdom Two Crowns, la croissance et l'expansion de votre royaume vous donnent accès à de nouvelles unités et technologies.  
        
  Plongez vers l'inconnu au-delà de vos frontières, à travers des forêts perdues et des ruines antiques à la recherche de trésors cachés et de savoirs oubliés qui vous aideront dans votre quête. Qui sait quels artefacts légendaires et créatures mythiques vous découvrirez ?
        
  Quand tombe la nuit, les ombres prennent vie et les terribles Rapaces assaillent votre royaume. Ralliez vos troupes, rassemblez votre courage et prenez les armes, car chaque nouvelle nuit exigera toujours plus de prouesses tactiques de votre part. Déployez archers, chevaliers et engins de siège, et exploitez vos artefacts et vos capacités de monarque pour repousser les hordes de Rapaces. 
        
  En tant que monarque, menez l'assaut contre la source des Rapaces pour sécuriser vos îles. Envoyez vos soldats affronter l'ennemi, mais attention : veillez à ce que vos troupes soient suffisamment nombreuses et bien préparées, car les Rapaces ne se rendront pas sans combattre.  
        
  Kingdom Two Crowns est un jeu en constante évolution qui inclut déjà plusieurs mises à jour de contenu gratuites :
     Shogun  : Découvrez une terre inspirée de l'architecture et de la culture du Japon féodal. Incarnez un puissant Shogun ou une grande Onna-bugeisha, faites appel aux ninjas pour vous aider, menez vos soldats au combat en chevauchant le mythologique Kirin et élaborez de nouvelles stratégies pour vaincre les Rapaces qui se cachent dans l'épaisse forêt de bambous.
     Dead Lands  : Aventurez-vous dans les terres les plus sombres de Kingdom. Incarnez des monarques uniques, tels que la lieuse d'éclats Miriam, tirés du RPG d'action d'horreur gothique Bloodstained.
     Îles des défis  : La plus grande épreuve jamais vue, réservée aux monarques vétérans. Relevez cinq défis aux règles et aux objectifs variés. Survivrez-vous assez longtemps pour vous emparer de la couronne d'or ?
    Votre aventure n'est qu'un début. Explorez d'autres lieux et récits dans les DLC et le contenu additionnel du jeu. Restez vigilant, monarque, car les nuits s'annoncent sombres et pleines de périls pour votre couronne !

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel       
 
   Bauen – Erkunden – Verteidigen – Erobern   
 
 Diese unerforschten, mittelalterlichen Lande mit uralten Monumenten, Relikten und mythischen Kreaturen sind von großen Geheimnissen umgeben. Echos vergangener Zeiten zeugen von längst vergangener Größe. In Kingdom Two Crowns, aus der Reihe des preisgekrönten Franchise Kingdom, stürzt ihr euch als Monarchen ins Abenteuer. Auf eurer seitwärts scrollenden Reise hoch zu Ross rekrutiert ihr treue Untertanen, baut euer Königreich auf und beschützt die Krone vor den Habgierigen, den monströsen Kreaturen, die die Schätze eures Königreichs rauben wollen.
 
 Reist allein oder zweit – in Kingdom Two Crowns können sich Monarchen zu einem Duo zusammenschließen, um ein Königreich zu errichten, das die Zeiten überdauert.
 
       
 
 Legt die Basis für ein mächtiges Königreich mit hohen Mauern, schützenden Türmen und sorgt für Wohlstand, indem ihr Bauernhöfe baut und Dorfbewohner anheuert. In Kingdom Two Crowns verschafft euch das Erweitern eures Königreichs Zugriff auf neue Einheiten und Technologien.
  
       
 
 Wagt euch ins Unbekannte jenseits eurer Grenzen hinaus, durch abgeschiedene Wälder und alte Ruinen, um Schätze und verborgenes Wissen zu suchen, die euch auf euer Quest helfen. Niemand weiß, auf welche legendären Artefakte oder mythische Wesen ihr stoßt.
 
       
 
 Bei Einbruch der Nacht erwachen die Schatten zum Leben und monströse Habgierige greifen euer Königreich an. Versammelt eure Truppen, nehmt allen Mut zusammen und wappnet euch, denn in jeder Nacht sind taktische Meisterleistungen gefragt. Entsendet Bogenschützen, Ritter, Belagerungswaffen, und setzt neue Monarchenfähigkeiten und Artefakte ein, um den Wellen der Habgierigen standzuhalten.
 
       
 
 Führt als Monarch Angriffe gegen die Quelle der Habgierigen durch, um eure Inseln zu schützen. Schickt Soldaten los, damit sie sich dem Gegner stellen. Aber vergesst nicht: Sorgt dafür, dass eure Truppen vorbereitet und in ausreichender Stärke vorhanden sind, da sich die Habgierigen nicht kampflos ergeben.
 
       
 
 Kingdom Two Crowns ist ein sich entwickelndes Erlebnis, das mehrere kostenlose Inhalts-Updates umfasst: 
 
    Shogun:  Reist in Länder, die von der Architektur und Kultur des feudalen Japan inspiriert sind. Spielt als mächtiger Shogun oder Onna-bugeisha, sichert euch die Unterstützung der Ninja, führt eure Soldaten auf dem Rücken des mythologischen Kirin in die Schlacht und entwickelt neue Strategien im Kampf gegen die Habgierigen, die sich in den dichten Bambuswäldern versteckt halten.
    Dead Lands:  Betretet die dunklen Lande von Kingdom. Spielt einzigartige Monarchen wie die Scherbenbinderin Miriam mit mächtigen Fähigkeiten aus dem Gothic-Horror-Rollenspiel Bloodstained. Reitet auf dem gigantischen Riesenkäfer, dem unheimlichen untoten Reittier, das Barrieren heraufbeschwört, und legt Fallen aus, die das Fortschreiten der Habgierigen behindern. Oder reitet auf dem mythischen Dämonenross ""Gamigin"" aus Bloodstained – mit seinem mächtigen Sturmangriff.
    Herausforderungsinseln:  Dies ist die größte Herausforderung – selbst für abgehärtete Monarchen. Stellt euch fünf Herausforderungen mit unterschiedlichen Regeln und Zielen. Überlebt ihr lang genug, um euch die Krone zu holen?  
 Euer Abenteuer ist erst der Anfang. Erkundet noch nicht erzählte Geschichten und Umgebungen in zusätzlichen DLCs und Inhalten, die für das Spiel verfügbar sind. Oh, Monarchen, bleibt wachsam, denn dunkle Nächte stehen euch bevor ... beschützt die Krone!

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  Acerca do jogo        
 
  Constrói - Explora - Defende - Conquista 
  Uma névoa misteriosa envolve terras medievais, onde monumentos, relíquias e criaturas míticas esperam por ti. Ecos de eras passadas relatam a grandeza de outrora no Kingdom Two Crowns, parte da galardoada série Kingdom, onde partirás numa aventura no papel de Monarch. Nesta aventura de deslocação lateral, terás de montar o teu cavalo, recrutar súbditos fiéis, construir o teu reino e proteger a coroa do Greed: um bando de criaturas monstruosas que pretende roubar os tesouros do reino.
  Aventura-te a solo ou com companhia. No Kingdom Two Crowns, uma dupla de Monarchs pode colaborar para criar um reino eterno.
        
  Prepara as bases do teu reino com muralhas e torres gigantescas, sem esquecer a prosperidade através da construção de quintas e recrutamento de súbditos. No Kingdom Two Crowns, a expansão do reino é a única forma de encontrar novas unidades e tecnologias.
        
  Aventura-te no desconhecido para lá das tuas fronteiras, através de florestas isoladas e ruínas ancestrais, e procura tesouros e conhecimento até cumprires a tua missão. Pelo caminho, talvez também encontres artefactos lendários e criaturas mitológicas!
        
  Com o cair da noite, as trevas ganham vida... na forma do monstruoso Greed! Reúne tropas, ganha coragem e prepara-te para enfrentar esta ameaça ao teu reino, pois cada noite vai obrigar-te a encontrar novas soluções estratégicas. Posiciona arqueiros, cavaleiros, catapultas e novas habilidades e artefactos do Monarch para sobreviver às hordas do Greed.
        
  Lidera assaltos contra a origem do Greed e protege as tuas ilhas. Envia exércitos para destruírem o inimigo, mas tem cuidado. Verifica sempre se as tuas tropas estão ao nível dos números surpreendentes do Greed.
        
  O Kingdom Two Crowns é uma experiência envolvente que inclui várias atualizações de conteúdo:
     Shogun : viaja até territórios inspirados pela arquitetura e cultura do Japão feudal. Joga com Shogun ou Onna-bugeisha, pede a ajuda de ninjas, lidera exércitos no topo da mítica Kirin e forma novas estratégias para enfrentares o Greed nas florestas de bambu.
     Dead Lands : explora os territórios mais sombrios do reino. Joga com os Monarchs, incluindo a Shardbinder Miriam do RPG gótico de terror Bloodstained.
     Challenge Islands : o maior desafio de sempre, até para os Monarchs mais experientes. Enfrenta cinco desafios com regras e objetivos distintos. Serás capaz de sobreviver e reclamar a coroa de ouro?
    A tua aventura ainda está no início. Explora mais histórias inéditas e configurações com os DLCs e conteúdos disponíveis. Monarch, protege a coroa e mantém-te vigilante, há noites sombrias a chegar!

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  Om spillet        
   Byg – Udforsk – Forsvar – Erobring 
  Mystikken indhyller de uudforskede middelalderlige riger, hvor ældgamle monumenter, relikvier og mytiske væsner venter. Ekkoet fra en svunden tid fortæller om tidligere tiders storhed. I Kingdom Two Crowns, som er en del af den prisbelønnede Kingdom-serie, drager du ud på et eventyr som en ridende monark, der må rekruttere undersåtter, opbygge et rige og beskytte kronen med The Greed, som er en flok monsterlignende skabninger, der vil stjæle rigets skatte.
  Rejs alene eller sammen med andre – i Kingdom Two Crowns kan to monarker samarbejde om at opbygge et stort og varigt rige.
        
  Læg fundamentet til et storslået kongerige med højre mure og forsvarstårne, mens du sørger for fremgang ved at etablere gårde og rekruttere landsbyboere. I Kingdom Two Crowns får du adgang til nye enheder og ny teknologi, når dit kongerige vokser.
        
  Rejs uden for dit riges beskyttende grænser, gennem fjerne skove og oldgamle ruiner for at finde skatte og skjult viden, der kan hjælpe dig undervejs. Hvem ved, hvad du kan finde af legendariske artefakter og mytiske væsner.
        
  Når natten sænker sig, vågner skyggerne, og de monsteragtige væsner kaldet The Greed angriber kongeriget. Saml din hær, vær modig og gør dig klar, for hver eneste nat kræver, at du bliver klogere og udvikler dine taktiske færdigheder. Placér bueskytter, riddere og belejringsvåben, og brug nye monarkfædigheder og artefakter for at kæmpe mod horder af The Greed.
        
  Som monark fører du an i angreb mod kilden til The Greed for at sikre dine øer. Send grupper af soldater ud for at kæmpe mod fjenden. En lille advarsel: Sørg for, at din hær er klar og mægtig nok, da The Greed ikke overgiver sig uden kamp.
        
  Kingdom Two Crowns er en spiloplevelse under konstant udvikling og med flere gratis opdateringer:
     Shogun : Rejs til lande med arkitektur, der er inspireret af det feudale Japan. Spil som en mægtig shogun eller Onna-bugeisha, hverv ninjaer, før dine soldater i kamp på toppen af det mytologiske Kirin, og læg nye strategier, mens du kæmper mod The Greed i tætte bambusskove.
     Dead Lands : Udforsk de mørkeste afkroge af kongeriget. Spil som forskellige monarker, inklusive Shardbinder Miriam, med inspiration fra det gotiske actiongyserspil Bloodstained.
     Udfordringsøer : Den største udfordring nogensinde til benhårde veteranmonarker. Kast dig ud i fem udfordringer med forskellige regler og mål. Kan du overleve længe nok til at tage guldkronen?
    Dit eventyr er kun lige begyndt. Udforsk flere historier og omgivelser i downloadpakker med masser af nyt indhold til spillet. Vær opmærksom og modig i den mørke nat for at beskytte din krone!

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco        
   Costruisci - Esplora - Difendi - Conquista!  
  Un velo di mistero avvolge queste terre medievali inesplorate dove troverai antichi monumenti, reliquie e creature mitologiche. Echi di epoche passate parlano della grandezza del tempo che fu: in Kingdom Two Crowns, parte della premiata serie Kingdom, ti imbarcherai in un'avventura come Monarca. In questo viaggio a scorrimento laterale in groppa al tuo destriero, recluta sudditi leali, costruisci il tuo Regno e proteggi la tua corona dai Greed, mostruose creature decise a trafugare il tesoro del tuo Regno.
  Viaggia da solo o in compagnia: in Kingdom Two Crowns, una coppia di Monarchi può collaborare per costruire e forgiare un Regno che resista alle ingiurie del tempo.
        
  Posa le fondamenta di un Regno potente con mura imponenti e torri di guardia, mentre fai crescere la sua prosperità costruendo fattorie e reclutando abitanti dei villaggi. In Kingdom Two Crowns espandere e far crescere il tuo Regno ti dà accesso a nuove unità e tecnologie.
        
  Avventurati nell'ignoto oltre la sicurezza dei tuoi confini, attraverso foreste remote e antiche rovine, alla ricerca di tesori e conoscenze nascoste per aiutarti nella tua missione. Quali artefatti leggendari o esseri mitologici troverai? Nessuno può saperlo.
        
  Quando cala la notte, le ombre prendono vita e i mostruosi Greed si lanciano all'assalto del tuo regno. Raduna le truppe, prendi il coraggio a due mani e preparati al peggio, perché ogni notte metterà alla prova il tuo acume tattico in sfide sempre più complesse. Schiera arcieri, cavalieri, armi d'assedio e persino nuove abilità e artefatti del Monarca per resistere alle ondate dei Greed.
        
  Come Monarca, guida l'assalti contro i luoghi da cui provengono i Greed per proteggere le tue isole. Invia manipoli di soldati contro il nemico. Fai attenzione, però: assicurati che le tue truppe siano preparate e in numero sufficiente, perché i Greed venderanno cara la pelle.
        
  Kingdom Two Crowns è un'esperienza in continua evoluzione, con una serie di contenuti gratuiti:
     Shogun : viaggia in terre ispirate all'architettura e alla cultura del Giappone feudale. Vesti i panni del possente Shogun o di Onna-bugeisha; assicurati la fedeltà dei ninja, conduci le truppe in battaglia in groppa al mitologico Kirin e delinea nuove strategie per affrontare i Greed in agguato tra le fitte foreste di bambù.
     Dead Lands : esplora il lato oscuro del Regno. Gioca nei panni di monarchi unici, tra cui la Shardbinder Miriam, con potenti abilità, dal GdR d'azione horror Bloodstained.
     Isole della sfida : la sfida più complessa mai affrontata anche dai Monarchi più veterani. Affronta cinque sfide con regole e obiettivi diversi. Riuscirai a sopravvivere abbastanza a lungo da guadagnare la corona d'oro?
    La tua avventura è solo l'inizio. Esplora altre storie e ambientazioni mai raccontate nei DLC e nei contenuti aggiuntivi disponibili per il gioco. Resta vigile, Monarca, perché le notti più buie devono ancora arrivare. Proteggi la corona!

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  关于游戏        
    建造 - 探索 - 保卫 - 征服   
  
  神秘的面纱笼罩着这片未知的中世纪大地，古老的纪念碑、遗迹和神话般的生物在此等待你的到来。往昔时代的回音诉说着过去的伟大， 《王国：两位君主》 是屡获殊荣的《王国》系列游戏的一部分，你将作为君主踏上冒险之旅。在这趟横轴冒险旅程中，你将骑上坐骑，征召忠诚的臣民，建设你的王国，同时还得保护王冠不被贪婪生物夺走——这些骇人的怪物满心想着将王国的宝藏偷个一干二净。 
  
  独行还是同行 - 在《王国：两位君主》中，两位君主可以携手合作，建立并巩固一个经得起时间考验的王国。  
     
  
  
        
  建造高耸的城墙和瞭望塔，为强大的王国奠定基础，同时建造农场、征召村民，从而实现繁荣。在《王国：两位君主》中，你可以通过扩大和发展王国，获得新的臣民兵将和技术。  
   
        
  探索疆域以外的未知之地，穿过偏僻的森林和古老的废墟，寻找宝藏和隐藏的知识，协助你一路冒险。谁知道你会发现什么传奇神器或神话生灵呢？ 
  
        
  随着夜幕降临，暗影开始苏醒，骇人的贪婪生物也将袭击你的王国。召集军队、鼓起勇气、磨练自己，因为每一晚都要求你不断增长自身的战术技巧。部署弓箭手、骑士、攻城武器，甚至是新获得的君主能力和神器，来抵御贪婪生物的浪潮。 
  
        
  你作为一国之君，需要亲自率军攻击贪婪生物的源头，才能保护辖下诸岛。派遣你的部队，去与敌人交战。注意：请确保你的军队兵精粮足，因为贪婪生物不会不战而降。   
  
        
  《王国：两位君主》能带给玩家不断进化的游戏体验，包含几项免费的内容更新：
  
   幕府时代： 这片土地的灵感来自日本封建时代的建筑和文化。化身强大的幕府将军或女武士，征召忍者，骑上神兽麒麟，率军作战，一面运筹帷幄，一面鏖战竹林深处的贪婪生物。
   死亡之地： 深入王国的黑暗之地。化身哥特风恐怖动作角色扮演游戏《赤痕》中的碎片人米莉娅姆等独特的君主，获得相应的强大特性。骑上巨大的甲虫，布设陷阱；骑上诡异的不死生物，召唤障碍，阻止贪婪生物的侵袭；或者骑上《赤痕》神秘的恶魔生物加麦基，发动强大的冲刺攻击。
   挑战岛： 对于久经沙场的老练君主来说，这是有史以来最大的挑战。迎接五项规则和目标各不相同的挑战。你能尽力活下来，并夺得金王冠吗？
  你的冒险才刚刚开始。在额外的DLC和游戏内容中，探索更多不为人知的故事和场景。君主啊，请保持警惕，因为黑夜就要来临，保护好你的王冠！

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  關於此遊戲        
   建造 - 探索 - 防禦 - 征服 
  神祕的面紗籠罩著這片未知的中世紀大地，古老的紀念碑、遺跡和神話般的生物在此等待你的到來。往昔時代的回音訴說著過去的偉大，《Kingdom Two Crowns》是屢獲殊榮的《Kingdom》系列遊戲的一部分，你將化身君主，踏上冒險之旅。在這趟橫軸冒險旅程中，騎上坐騎，徵召忠誠的臣民，建設你的王國，同時還得保護王冠不被貪婪生物奪走——這些駭人的怪物滿心想著將王國的寶藏偷個一乾二淨。
  獨旅還是同行？在《Kingdom Two Crowns》中，兩位君主可以攜手合作，逐步堆砌出一個經得起時間考驗的王國。
        
  建造高聳的城牆和瞭望塔，為強大王國奠定基礎，同時建造農場、徵召村民，使王國欣欣向榮。在《Kingdom Two Crowns》中，你可以開疆闢土、增強國力，逐步獲得新的臣民兵將和技術。
        
  探索疆域以外的未知之地，穿過偏僻的森林和古老的廢墟，尋找寶藏和隱藏的知識，協助你一路冒險。誰知道你會發現什麼傳奇神器或神話生靈呢？
        
  隨著夜幕降臨，暗影開始甦醒，駭人的貪婪生物也將襲擊你的王國。召集軍隊、鼓起勇氣、磨練自己，你必須不斷增長自身的戰術技巧，才有望夜復一夜地保住性命。部署弓箭手、騎士、攻城武器，甚至是新獲得的君主能力和神器，抵禦一波又一波襲來的貪婪生物。
        
  你作為一國之君，需要親自率軍攻擊貪婪生物的源頭，才能保護轄下諸島。派遣麾下部隊挺身迎敵。注意：請確保你的軍隊兵精糧足，因為貪婪生物不會不戰而降。
        
  《Kingdom Two Crowns》帶給玩家不斷進化的遊戲體驗，包含幾項免費內容更新：
     《Shogun》 ：造訪新國度，探索以日本封建時代的文化與建築為靈感的場景。成為強大的幕府將軍或女武士，謀取忍者支持、駕馭傳說中的麒麟來率領部隊作戰，並運籌帷幄，無畏面對躲在重重竹林內的敵人。
     《Dead Lands》 ：深入王國的黑暗之地。化身成獨一無二、擁有強大特質的君主，例如哥德式恐怖動作RPG遊戲《血咒之城：暗夜儀式》的碎片人米利暗。
     挑戰島 ：對於久經沙場的老練君主來說，這是有史以來最大的挑戰。迎接五項規則和目標各不相同的挑戰。你能活得夠久，奪得最終的金王冠嗎？
    你的冒險才剛剛開始。在額外的DLC和擴充內容中，探索更多不為人知的故事和場景。君主啊，請保持警戒，因為黑夜就要來臨，保護好你的王冠！

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  ゲームについて        
   建築し、探索せよ。王国を守り、征服せよ。 
  謎に包まれた中世の未開の地には、古代の遺跡や遺物、神話の怪物が待ち受けている。過ぎ去りし時代の響きは過去の栄光を語る。『Kingdom Two Crowns』は、いくつもの賞に輝いた『Kingdom』シリーズの一作だ。1人の君主として、横スクロールの冒険に出発しよう。忠実なる民を仲間にして、自分の王国を築き、財宝を狙う欲深き怪物「グリード」から王冠を守るのだ。
  旅は1人でも、2人でも
  『Kingdom Two Crowns』では、もう1人の君主と協力しながら、2人で時間という試練に耐えうる王国を築き上げることができる。
        
  そびえ立つ壁ややぐらを建てて強大なる王国の礎を築き、村人を集め農場を作って繁栄を実現しよう。王国を拡大、成長させれば、新しいユニットや技術を手に入れることができる。
        
  国境の守りを越えて、人里離れた森や古代の遺跡など未開の地を探索しよう。冒険の助けになる宝や隠された知識を探しているうちに、伝説のアーティファクトや神話の存在と遭遇することもあるだろう。
        
  日が沈むと影に命が宿り、怪物「グリード」が王国を襲う。勇気を奮い兵を率いて戦おう。敵は夜ごとに力を増し、生き残るには卓越した戦略眼が求められる。射手や騎士、攻城兵器、さらには君主の新しい力やアーティファクトを駆使して、襲いくるグリードの大群に立ち向かうのだ。
        
  君主として、領土の島々を守るためにグリードの発生源へ攻撃を仕掛けよう。兵を送り、敵と戦うのだ。しかし、十分な兵力と入念な準備を忘れてはならない。グリードも激しい抵抗を見せるだろう。
        
  『Kingdom Two Crowns』は無料のコンテンツアップデートなど、進化を続けている。これまでの中世のステージに加え、以下のようなステージが追加されている。
     ショーグン ：封建時代の日本の建築物や文化にインスパイアされた地へ旅立とう。強力な将軍や女武芸者となり、忍者の助力を得て、兵士たちを率いて伝説の麒麟に乗って戦い、うっそうとした竹林に隠れ潜むグリードを相手に勇敢に立ち向かうための新しい戦略を練れ。
     デッドランド ：王国の邪悪な地へ足を踏み入れよう。ゴシックホラー・アクションRPG『Bloodstained』から参戦の強力な特性を持つシャードバインダーのミリアムなど、特徴的な君主となってプレイできる。
     チャレンジ島 ：歴戦の君主のために用意された史上最難関の挑戦。異なるルールと目的が設定された5つのチャレンジに挑もう。長く生き延び、金の王冠を手にすることはできるか？
    冒険はまだ始まりに過ぎない。追加DLCやコンテンツアップデートでは、知られざる物語や舞台が待っている。ああ、君主よ。迫り来る夜に備えよ、王冠を守り続けるのだ！

10 Year Anniversary Roadmap      
 
 
  About the Game        
    Build - Explore - Defend - Conquer    
  A shroud of mystery envelops these uncharted medieval lands where ancient monuments, relics and mythical creatures await. Echoes of bygone eras speak of past greatness and in Kingdom Two Crowns, part of the award-winning franchise Kingdom, you embark on an adventure as the Monarch. In this side-scrolling journey atop your steed, you recruit loyal subjects, build your kingdom and protect your crown from the Greed, monstrous creatures looking to steal your kingdom's treasures.  
  Journey alone or together - in Kingdom Two Crowns, a duo of Monarchs can work cooperatively to build and forge a Kingdom that stands the test of time.   
        
  Lay the foundation of a mighty Kingdom with towering walls and protecting towers while cultivating prosperity through building farms and recruiting villagers. In Kingdom Two Crowns expanding and growing your Kingdom grants access to new units and technologies.   
        
  Venture into the unknown beyond the protection of your borders, through secluded forests and ancient ruins to seek treasures and hidden knowledge to aid your quest. Who knows what legendary artifacts or mythological beings you will find.  
        
  As the night falls, shadows come to life and the monstrous Greed assaults your kingdom. Rally your troops, muster your courage, and steel yourself, for each night will demand ever-growing feats of tactical mastermind. Deploy archers, knights, siege weapons, and even newfound Monarch abilities and artifacts to hold against the waves of Greed.  
        
  As the monarch, lead assaults against the source of the Greed to secure your islands. Send your groups of soldiers to clash with the enemy. A word of caution: make sure your troops are prepared and sufficient in numbers, as the Greed will not go down without a fight.   
        
  Kingdom Two Crowns is an evolving experience that includes several free content updates:   
     Shogun:  Journey to lands inspired by the architecture and culture of feudal Japan. Play as the mighty Shogun or Onna-bugeisha, enlist the ninja, lead your soldiers to battle atop the mythological Kirin, and form new strategies as you brave the Greed hiding in thick bamboo forests.  
     Dead Lands:  Enter the dark lands of Kingdom. Play as unique Monarchs, including the Shardbinder Miriam, with powerful traits from the gothic horror action-RPG Bloodstained. Ride the gigantic beetle to lay out traps, the eerie undead steed that summons barriers impeding the progress of the Greed, or the mythical demon horse Gamigin from Bloodstained, with its powerful charge attack.   
     Challenge Islands:  Representing the greatest challenge ever seen for hardened veteran monarchs.  Take on five challenges with different rules and objectives. Can you survive long enough to claim the gold crown?  
    Your adventure is only the beginning. Explore more untold stories and settings in the additional DLCs and content available for the game. Oh Monarch, stay vigilant for dark nights are still to come, protect your crown!
屡获殊荣的微策略游戏系列推出了最新的升级版，在这里经营并建设您自己的王国，保护它免受贪婪生物的威胁！在全新的单人或合作战役模式里，体验新的科技、部队、敌人、坐骑和隐藏要素。
